---
title: "Intergenerational Education Mobility in Uzbekistan"
subtitle: "Research Update"
author: "Research Team"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    incremental: true
    theme: simple
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Motivation

- Mobility is central to inclusive growth.
- Uzbekistan has a young population and strong policy interest in educational opportunity.

## Research Design

- Module A: Mobility measurement and trends
- Module B: Correlates of mobility
- Module C: Pandemic mechanisms from the LiTS IV child module (suggestive and non-causal)

## Data

- LiTS: 2010, 2016, 2022-23
- HBS for supplementary context
- Publication literature section integrated from the current review outputs

## Current Stage

- Main draft merged into the Quarto paper
- Literature review and limits note integrated into the main paper
- Publication-facing scope aligned to the descriptive/associational design

## Next Step

1. Final rendering of the paper package
2. Final robustness pass within the locked descriptive design
3. Publication cleanup across report outputs
